decision_title: User authentication via external SSO only
evidence_quotes: Users will log in exclusively via SSO through the external Portal.

decision_title: System will not implement internal login/registration
evidence_quotes: This system will not implement its own login or registration functionality.
Two main features to prioritize: 1. Photo upload
Two main features to prioritize: 2. Output modeling

decision_title: Sidebar to distinguish Album and Project folder types
evidence_quotes: The sidebar needs to distinguish between two folder types — "Album" and "Project" — managing photos and modeling data separately
The Album must support adding, deleting, and searching photos

decision_title: Modeling progress displayed as a progress bar
evidence_quotes: Modeling progress must be shown as a progress bar, displaying the status of each stage (AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation, etc.)

decision_title: Project creation allows photo selection from list
evidence_quotes: When creating a project, users can select photos from the photo list to import into the project folder
Project sharing: A project folder can designate other users to jointly view the modeling results; Albums are private to the owner only and do not support multi-user access
Resumable uploads: If an upload is interrupted, upload progress is preserved via a caching mechanism, supporting resume-from-breakpoint
Storage quota management: The user's personal page displays used and remaining storage; each user's photo-upload limit can be dynamically adjusted based on system settings and permissions
AT error handling: When AT computation fails, provide a mechanism to adjust parameters and re-run
Expert mode: After photo upload, distinguish between "Normal Mode" (default parameters) and "Expert Mode" (freely adjustable parameters)

decision_title: V1 to implement Normal Mode only for parameter adjustment
evidence_quotes: V1 will implement Normal Mode only
